Interfaces

BDConnectionWorkspaceFactory

Esri Big Data Connection Workspace Factory.

BimFileWorkspace

Esri BIM File Workspace

BimFileWorkspaceFactory

BimFile Workspace Factory.

BimModelObject

Esri BIM File Model class.

CadDrawingName

Cad Drawing Name object

CadWorkspaceFactory

Esri Cad Workspace Factory.

ICadDrawingDataset

Provides access to members that control the Cad Drawing Dataset.

ICadDrawingLayers

Provides access to properties that give information on the layers in the CAD drawing.

ICadDrawingWorkspace

Provides access to members that control the Cad Drawing Workspace.

ICadSettings

Provides access to members that control the use of Dgn files with any file extension.

ICadTransformations

Provides access to members that control Cad Transformations.

IDataLicenseInfo

Provides access to data license information.

IDataLicenseManager

Provides access to data license manager.

IMetaInfo

Provides access to meta information.

ISdcExporter

Provides access to members for compressing data to SDC.

IUsageModeInfo

Provides access to user mode information.

IUsageModeOption

Provides access to user mode options.

LicensedDataExtension

The Licensed Data Extension.

PCCoverageWorkspaceFactory

Esri PC ARC/INFO Workspace Factory.

ParquetFileWorkspace

Parquet File Workspace

SdcExporter

Helper object for exporting data to SDC.

ShapefileWorkspaceFactory

Esri Shapefile Workspace Factory.

TinWorkspaceFactory

Esri TIN workspace factory is used to access TINs on disk.

VpfWorkspaceFactory

Esri VPF Workspace Factory

Enums

esriCadTransform

The type of transformations applied to a CAD dataset.

esriDataLicenseType

Data license type enumeration
